# Mástoras — Clarity & Story Consultancy

> Mástoras helps founders, trades, and community organisations in Northern Ireland turn unclear ideas into grounded decisions. Structure first. Story second. Then everything moves.

## About

Mástoras is a clarity and story consultancy based on the Causeway Coast, Northern Ireland. Founded by Garry Nicholl, who spent 25 years in construction and project delivery before starting the consultancy. The name comes from the Greek word for craftsman — reflecting the approach: careful, grounded, built to last.

Mástoras works with founders before they commit to a new idea, owner-operators in the trades who need pricing and positioning clarity, and community organisations that need funding narratives and governance support.

Contact: hello@mastoras.uk
Website: https://mastoras.uk
Book a free call: https://calendly.com/garynicholl1515/20min

## Founder

**Garry Nicholl** — Clarity & Story Consultant, Causeway Coast, Northern Ireland.
25 years in construction and project delivery. Started Mástoras to close the gap between a good idea and a grounded one. Supportive in approach, uncompromising on what's true.

## Methodology

Structure → Story → Soul.

1. Structure — get the plan, the numbers, and the decision right first
2. Story — build the narrative, the positioning, and the case
3. Soul — find the why that makes it worth doing

## Services

### Pre-Build Assessment (Lite £300 / Standard £450 / Plus £650)
Before committing money or reputation to a new idea — stress-test it properly. Includes a decision memo, route comparisons, clear Proceed / Pause / Stop recommendation, and an exit strategy built in from day one. Three tiers depending on complexity.

### Brand Story Sprint (£650)
For businesses that do good work but struggle to explain it. One sprint to turn scattered ideas into a usable narrative — brand summary, core messaging, and a Field Guide for every sales conversation, pitch, or proposal.

### Trades Business Tune-Up (£250)
Specialist support for owner-operators in the trades. Pricing review, day rate documented, job scheduling workflow, and customer communications. Built by someone with 25 years on sites, not in an office.

### The First Fix (£195)
One session to find the single biggest bottleneck and clear it. 1-page diagnostic, 30-day action plan. For businesses that are running but stuck.

### Grant Reframe (£450)
A funder-aligned narrative for a specific project or application, written from the criteria backwards. Reusable language included.

### Funding Roadmap (£450)
A curated 12-month funding shortlist for community organisations — what to apply for, eligibility notes, deadlines, and a 30-day evidence plan.

### Impact & Governance Pack (from £395)
Impact measurement framework, governance health check, and stakeholder narrative support for CICs, charities, and community projects.

## Who comes to Mástoras

Three common patterns:

1. Their offer is doing work they can't explain — good at what they do, can't communicate why it matters
2. They're about to commit to something that hasn't been stress-tested — a new venture, location, or pivot where the risks haven't been named
3. Their funding case is real but their application sounds like everyone else's — the project is genuine but the narrative isn't funder-aligned

- Why Most Tradespeople Undercharge — And What It's Costing Them — https://mastoras.uk/blog/why-tradespeople-undercharge

## Location

Causeway Coast and Glens, Northern Ireland. Works remotely with clients across Northern Ireland and beyond. In-person available for local clients who prefer it.
